## Checklist

- [ ] Frontend: `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build` pass (if applicable).
- [ ] Backend: `ruff check .` and `pytest` pass (if applicable).
- [ ] Tests and documentation were added or updated as needed.
- [ ] No sensitive, embargoed, or personally identifiable data is included.
